set_custom_speed.description: Switch the pump to custom mode and run at a target RPM for a duration.

duration_seconds.description: How long to hold the custom speed.

return_to_schedule.name: Return to schedule
return_to_schedule.description: Return the pump to its normal schedule (Auto mode).
